name: PR/Branch Diff Summary
description: MCP tool: repos.pull_request_diff_summary — returns a categorized summary of file changes in a PR or branch for a task, with per-category counts and derived booleans (codeChanged/docsOnly/testsChanged/configOnly).

githubToken.description: GitHub token to authenticate PR/branch lookups (optional). If not set, falls back to HTTP basic auth via personal access URL or repo URL.

taskResolution.description: Custom taskId->PR mapping (regex pattern to URL). Useful when tasks are linked via other PR services.
